targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)) - 1) * 100, 2) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)) - 1) * 100, 2) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT currently_in_drawdown AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT currently_in_drawdown AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY ABS(unrealized_pnl) DESC LIMIT 15;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY ABS(unrealized_pnl) DESC LIMIT 15;
